analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet quotes a former Chinese ambassador saying China and Africa are natural friends, treat each other as equals, and that international solidarity/cooperation is needed to defeat COVID-19. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention of the West or criticism. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; emphasizes China's equal, friendly partnership with Africa, solidarity, and cooperative stance in a global challenge, aligning with China's benevolent/multilateral image. CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically) – Not addressed; focus is international, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – No claims about domestic achievements or leadership success. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
